## Open Uncertainties (from QA batch files)

- Batch 001-010: no additional open uncertainties documented beyond normalized evaluations.
- 011: explicit contractual regulation for construction-traffic road damage remains not clearly fixed in reviewed plan texts.
- 012: fundamental objection on cumulative project scale in municipality remains contentious and not adopted.
- 018: explicit removal of the requested southern SO1 sub-area is still not evidentially traceable.
- 019: several detailed demands (including explicit handling of the Experimentierklausel) remain without explicit plan-level response.
- 020: no specific single-case evidence for private well/drainage safeguarding and property value impact in plan text.
- Batch 021-030: uncertainties marked as appropriate per case; no additional new uncertainty items listed.
